fields.title: Create scaffolding: package.json, index.ts, shared/
fields.description:
Create the new tau extension structure with scaffolding files.

## Files to create

### extensions/tau/package.json
- Merge dependencies from task (ajv, ajv-formats) and sandbox (@anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime)
- Single pi.extensions entry pointing to ./src/index.ts

### extensions/tau/src/index.ts
- Import all feature init functions
- Create shared state
- Wire up session_start for TauEditor
- Skeleton with TODO comments for each feature

### extensions/tau/src/shared/index.ts
- Re-export from state.ts and config.ts

### extensions/tau/src/shared/state.ts
- TauState type definition
- createState() function
- Placeholder sections for each feature's state

### extensions/tau/src/shared/config.ts
- TauConfig type for pi settings.json
- Single 'tau' key namespace

## DoD
- npm install works in extensions/tau/
- pi can load the extension (empty but no errors)
- Folder structure matches agreed design
fields.close_reason: Created tau extension scaffolding (single entrypoint + shared state/config) and verified npm install
